ddls:
CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the technology in resources */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* Tier level of the technology */,
  "effects_unlocks" TEXT /* Effects and unlocks associated with the technology */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites required to unlock the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "research_area" TEXT /* Categorization into specific research areas */,
  "impact_on_empire" TEXT /* Overall impact on the empire */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date for the technology */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the technology record was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prereq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite entry */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology that has prerequisites */,
  "prereq_tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology that is a prerequisite */,
  "prereq_type" TEXT /* Type of prerequisite */,
  "prereq_description" TEXT /* Description of the prerequisite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prereq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prereq_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("prereq_tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect entry */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology that has this effect */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the effect */,
  "effect_type" TEXT /* Type of effect */,
  "effect_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effects_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effects_unlocks" (
  "unlock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unlock entry */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology that leads to this unlock */,
  "unlock_description" TEXT /* Description of the unlock */,
  "unlock_type" TEXT /* Type of unlock */,
  "unlock_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the unlock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unlock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effects_unlocks_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scientists" (
  "scientist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scientist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scientist */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise (e.g., Psionics) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliated organization or project */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scientist */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the scientist */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the field */,
  "current_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current project the scientist is working on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scientist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology being researched */,
  "scientist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scientist leading the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* Key milestones of the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_scientist_id FOREIGN KEY ("scientist_id") REFERENCES scientists ("scientist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource entry */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology linked to the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the resource record was updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the technology */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the technology */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the user when accessing the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
